title: neurocallis polyphylla
intro: Neurocallis polyphylla, also known as the "many-leaved neurocallis," is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Neurocallis polyphylla include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Neurocallis polyphylla is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
